name: Orange-Ginger Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the ginger and cream cheese together until smooth.
2. Add the sour cream to the mixture and blend well.
3. Stir in the orange juice and orange zest.
4. Cover the bowl and chill.
5. Makes about 1 1/4 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers:
Apricots, Chicken, Pound Cake Cubes
